texto: There’s something almost greedy about empathy, because it relies on the notion that we can somehow assimilate the other. A respectful and thoughtful distance is also part of what enables us to respond to the other’s needs.
explicacao: Citação de Kate Rossiter sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There’s something almost greedy about empathy, because it relies on the notion that we can someho…” articula reflexao, empathy, other em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
